command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
BASE='/home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub'

echo '=== core.py lines 1100-1400 (_run method) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "sed -n '1100,1400p' $BASE/core.py" 2>&1

echo '=== Total lines in core.py ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "wc -l $BASE/core.py" 2>&1

echo DONE_1920
